---
title: "FINSTAD Case 1 — Executive Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: styles.css
    orientation: rows
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(plotly)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(ggplot2)

con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "data/master_dataset.sqlite")
fin <- tbl(con, "integrated_data") |> collect() |> mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))
palette <- c(AAPL = "#555555", BDO = "#003D6B", BTC = "#F7931A", SPY = "#00733E")
```

```{r compute, include=FALSE}
risk_adj <- fin |> filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |>
  summarise(Mean_DR = mean(Daily_Return), SD_DR = sd(Daily_Return),
            Sharpe = mean(Daily_Return) / sd(Daily_Return), .groups = "drop")

covid <- fin |> filter(Date >= "2020-02-01", Date <= "2020-03-31", !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  summarise(Crash = last(CumRet), .groups = "drop")

vix_regime <- fin |> filter(!is.na(VIX), !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  mutate(Regime = ifelse(VIX > 30, "High Fear", ifelse(VIX < 20, "Low Fear", "Moderate"))) |>
  filter(Regime %in% c("High Fear", "Low Fear")) |>
  group_by(Asset, Regime) |>
  summarise(Mean_DR = mean(Daily_Return), .groups = "drop")

inflation <- fin |> filter(CPI_YoY > 0.05, !is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |>
  summarise(Infl_Return = last(CumRet), .groups = "drop")

cum_returns <- fin |> filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(CumRet = cumprod(1 + Daily_Return) - 1) |> ungroup()

cr_wide <- cum_returns |> select(Date, Asset, CumRet) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Date, values_from = CumRet)
dd_wide <- cum_returns |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(DD = CumRet - cummax(CumRet)) |> ungroup() |>
  select(Date, Asset, DD) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Date, values_from = DD)
dates_seq <- sort(unique(cum_returns$Date))

cor_matrix <- fin |> select(Date, Asset, Daily_Return) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Asset, values_from = Daily_Return) |>
  select(AAPL, BDO, BTC, SPY) |> cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

cor_long <- cor_matrix |> as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Asset1") |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-Asset1, names_to = "Asset2", values_to = "Correlation") |>
  mutate(Asset1 = factor(Asset1, levels = rev(c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "SPY"))),
         Asset2 = factor(Asset2, levels = c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "SPY")))

roll_vol <- fin |> filter(!is.na(Daily_Return)) |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(Roll_SD = slider::slide_dbl(Daily_Return, sd, .before = 29, .complete = TRUE) * sqrt(252)) |>
  ungroup() |> filter(!is.na(Roll_SD))
rv <- roll_vol[seq(1, nrow(roll_vol), 5), ]

drawdown <- cum_returns |>
  group_by(Asset) |> arrange(Date) |>
  mutate(Peak = cummax(CumRet), DD = CumRet - Peak) |> ungroup()
dd <- drawdown[seq(1, nrow(drawdown), 10), ]

cx <- cum_returns[seq(1, nrow(cum_returns), 10), ]
covid_plot <- covid |> mutate(Asset = factor(Asset, levels = covid$Asset[order(covid$Crash)]))
inf_plot <- inflation |>
  mutate(Asset = factor(Asset, levels = inflation$Asset[order(inflation$Infl_Return)]))
```

```{r base-chart, include=FALSE}
base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7))

mp <- function(p) {
  ggplotly(p) |> layout(margin = list(t = 15, b = 25, l = 35, r = 10))
}
```

## Row {height=50%}

### Column

#### Returns / Drawdown {style="display:flex; align-items:center; padding:0 8px; font-size:0.75em; color:#666"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(cx, aes(x = Date, y = CumRet, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B3B3B3", size = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal")
cr_pl <- ggplotly(p) |> layout(margin = list(t = 35, b = 30, l = 40, r = 10))

dd_traces <- lapply(c("AAPL", "BDO", "BTC", "SPY"), function(a) {
  ad <- dd_wide |> filter(Asset == a) |> select(-Asset) |> as.numeric()
  list(x = dates_seq, y = ad, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
       name = a, visible = FALSE, showlegend = FALSE,
       line = list(color = palette[[a]], dash = "dash", width = 1.5),
       hovertemplate = paste0(a, ": %{y:.1%}<extra></extra>"))
})

cr_pl |>
  add_trace(data = dd_traces[[1]], inherit = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = dd_traces[[2]], inherit = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = dd_traces[[3]], inherit = FALSE) |>
  add_trace(data = dd_traces[[4]], inherit = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    updatemenus = list(list(
      type = "dropdown", direction = "down", x = 1.02, y = 1, xanchor = "left",
      active = 0,
      buttons = list(
        list(label = "Cumulative Returns", method = "update",
             args = list(list(visible = c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE)),
                         list(title = list(text = ""),
                              yaxis = list(tickformat = ".0%")))),
        list(label = "Drawdown from Peak", method = "update",
             args = list(list(visible = c(FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE)),
                         list(title = list(text = ""),
                              yaxis = list(tickformat = ".0%"))))
      )
    ))
  )
```

### Column

#### Correlation Matrix

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Asset2, y = Asset1, fill = Correlation)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Correlation)), size = 2.8) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1DC9A4", mid = "#F2F2F2", high = "#2E45B8",
                       midpoint = 0.4, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
mp(p)
```

### Column

#### Risk vs Return

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(risk_adj, aes(x = SD_DR * 100, y = Mean_DR * 100, color = Asset,
                          text = paste(Asset, "R:", round(Mean_DR*100, 3),
                                       "% SD:", round(SD_DR*100, 2), "%"))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(x = "Risk (SD %)", y = "Mean Return (%)") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) + base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |> layout(margin = list(t = 15, b = 35, l = 45, r = 10))
```

### Column

#### Rolling 30-Day Volatility

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(rv, aes(x = Date, y = Roll_SD, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal")
mp(p)
```

## Row {height=50%}

### Column

#### Drawdown from Peak

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(dd, aes(x = Date, y = DD, color = Asset)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.6) +
  geom_area(aes(fill = Asset), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B3B3B3", size = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "horizontal")
mp(p)
```

### Column

#### COVID Crash

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(covid_plot, aes(x = Crash * 100, y = Asset, fill = Asset)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", Crash * 100),
                hjust = ifelse(Crash < 0, 1.1, -0.1)), size = 2.5, color = "#333333") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(x = "Drawdown (%)", y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())
mp(p)
```

### Column

#### VIX Regime

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(vix_regime, aes(x = Asset, y = Mean_DR * 100, fill = Regime)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, size = 0.3, color = "#595959") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High Fear" = "#C91D42", "Low Fear" = "#2E45B8")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean Daily Return (%)") + base_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank())
mp(p)
```

### Column

#### Inflation Hedge (CPI > 5%)

```{r}
#| echo: false
p <- ggplot(inf_plot, aes(x = Infl_Return * 100, y = Asset, fill = Asset)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f%%", Infl_Return * 100),
                hjust = ifelse(Infl_Return < 0, 1.1, -0.1)), size = 2.5, color = "#333333") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(x = "Cumulative Return (%)", y = NULL) + base_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())
mp(p)
```

```{r db-close, include=FALSE}
dbDisconnect(con)
```
